summary.concern: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — 20 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Good momentum — overdue count is down to 66. This is above the 7-day average of 53 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 28 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** The oldest overdue task is 10 days past due with 20 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. $31,172 in payments coming due this week — prepare funds.

PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.

**Milagros Porturas:** Down to 4 overdue — making progress.

168 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **80 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 39 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$54,007 in payments going out this week** across 32 tasks — make sure funds are available. $43,038 expected in from 5 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Stephanie and Marc Felton and Ginger Brown — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 18. Keep the momentum going.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 20 overdue (oldest: 10d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **7 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 19 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
